infrastructure.notes: Already delivered — electric trains, faster commute to Adelaide CBD (~50min).

forward.consensus: Strong early-cycle play with massive infrastructure tailwind. Watch oversupply risk late-cycle. Base 28-32% 5yr.

suburbs.stampDutyNote: At $637k: stamp ~$24k, total ~$95k — comfortable fit within $110k cash

supplyRisk.reason: Active greenfield: Springwood Estate, Woodvale Estate (45 lots Stage 6), Fairview Rise PLUS 350 homes approved at Gawler Belt. 43,800 homes unlocked within 5km at Two Wells/Roseworthy.

demandRisk.reason: Northern Adelaide employment growing (defence, healthcare) but still commuter-dependent

infrastructureRisk.reason: Gawler Line electrification COMPLETE. Northern Connector COMPLETE.

cycleRisk.reason: Post +13.9% CAGR spike. Incoming 43,800 homes = major supply correction risk 2027-2030.

riskFilter.riskNote: MAJOR SUPPLY RISK: 43,800 new dwellings being built within 5km as the urban growth boundary has been removed. Growth of 13.9% in past year is unlikely to continue — post-spike correction highly likely 2027-2030. Only pursue if you have exceptional value-add (e.g. genuinely subdividable block in R20+ zoning).

summary: 19 suburbs across WA, QLD, SA, VIC. STRONG BUY: Kirwan QLD (88), Condon QLD (87). BUY: Mandurah WA (85), Geraldton WA (84), Albany WA (83), Baldivis WA (82), Armadale WA (81), Wellard WA (81), Para Hills SA (80), Gawler SA (79), Salisbury North SA (78). Portfolio strategy: QLD (Kirwan/Condon/Aitkenvale) for max growth + WA (Perth mid/outer) + SA middle-ring (Para Hills established) for diversification.
